name: Tee Box Riverton
address: 12706 Old Liberty Way Suite 1, Riverton, UT 84096
about: Tee Box Riverton is an indoor golf training facility offering advanced simulator technology and a comprehensive range of coaching and fitness services. The facility is equipped with Trackman technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis, providing a professional-grade training experience. It operates on a 24-hour schedule and features amenities including a full gym, club fitting and repair services, and space for events and parties, catering to both individual practice and group activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman simulator technology provides precise data for swing analysis and improvement
24/7 access offers maximum flexibility for practice and training sessions
All-in-one facility combines golf simulators, gym access, club fitting, and coaching services

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera system providing highly accurate shot tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility also offers club rentals and professional fitting services to ensure proper equipment for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drinks, suggesting it may be permitted for private events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website mentions that 30 minutes at Tee Box is comparable to 90 minutes on the course, suggesting an 18-hole round could be completed in approximately 90 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box Riverton is family-friendly with coaches experienced in working with junior golfers and a welcoming environment for all skill levels.
